name: WELLS FARGO & COMPANY/MN
summary: Wells Fargo & Company is a diversified financial services company offering consumer banking, consumer lending, commercial banking, wealth management, brokerage, asset and investment management, investment banking, insurance, and annuities. Products and services include auto finance, deposits, mortgage origination and servicing, credit and debit cards, payment processing, merchant services, digital banking, middle market banking, custody, trust, treasury services, and alternative investments such as real estate, hedge funds, private credit, and private equity.

products.name: Consumer Banking
products.description: Deposit accounts, digital banking, and payment processing for retail customers.

products.name: Mortgage Services
products.description: Originating and servicing residential mortgage loans.

products.name: Credit and Debit Cards
products.description: Issuing and servicing credit and debit card products.

products.name: Wealth and Brokerage Services
products.description: Wealth management, brokerage, and asset/investment management services.

products.name: Investment Banking
products.description: Advisory on mergers and acquisitions, underwriting, dealing in and making markets in securities.

products.name: Insurance and Annuities
products.description: Providing and issuing insurance products and annuities, including as agent or broker.

products.name: Commercial Banking
products.description: Middle market banking, treasury, lending, custody, and trust services for businesses.

products.name: Alternative Investments
products.description: Real estate, hedge funds, private credit, and private equity investment services.

products.name: Payment and Merchant Services
products.description: Payment servicing, processing, and merchant services.
